novel_features.name: Offline Full-Text Search
novel_features.description: Full-text search across all synced meeting transcripts without consuming any API quota.

novel_features.name: Person Timeline
novel_features.description: Chronological meeting history with a specific person — topics, action items, and talk ratio per meeting.

novel_features.name: Cross-Meeting Action Items
novel_features.description: Aggregate action items from all meetings in a date range — weekly commitment audit in one command.

novel_features.name: Smart Meeting Discovery
novel_features.description: Find meetings by participant email, channel name, keyword, or date range — all client-side, no broken API date filters.

novel_features.name: Processing Status Check
novel_features.description: Show PROCESSED / PROCESSING / FAILED status for recent meetings upfront — know before you fetch.

novel_features.name: Topic Frequency Analysis
novel_features.description: Most frequent topics across all meetings in a date range — what is actually consuming meeting time.

novel_features.name: Morning Digest
novel_features.description: Aggregate view of all recent meetings: titles, gists, topics, and action items in one structured output.

novel_features.name: Vault Export
novel_features.description: Export a transcript as markdown to a vault directory with auto-generated YYYY-MM-DD_title.md filename.
